/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wpedantic -Wextra -Weffc++ -Werror -Wshadow -Wpointer-arith -Wcast-qual -Wformat=2 -Wno-unqualified-std-cast-call -g CMakeFiles/net_interface_test_pending.dir/net_interface_test_pending.cc.o -o net_interface_test_pending  libcomp_net_testing_debug.a ../src/libcomp_net_debug.a ../util/libutil_debug.a
